title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO TALLAG IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CABAGAN, PROVINCE OF ISABELA, TO BARRIO BIUAG.

chunks.text:
H. No. 263 / 67 OG No. 35, 6866 (August 30, 1971)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6182, June 19, 1971 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO TALLAG IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CABAGAN, PROVINCE OF ISABELA, TO BARRIO BIUAG.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines

in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Barrio Tallag in the Municipality of Cabagan, Province of Isabela, is hereby changed to Barrio Biuag.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1971.
